title: The Game That Kills
writer: Grace Neville, Fred Niblo Jr., J. Benton Cheney
actors: Charles Quigley, Rita Hayworth, John Gallaudet
plot: Tom Ferguson, star left wing of the Indians hockey team, is killed during a game in an "accident" with Dick Adams and Bill Drake, two of his own teammates. His brother, Alec Ferguson, is not convinced it was and accident, and goes...
